name: SHUUGYOU: SAIKITSUI NO WAZA (TRAINING: ABILITY IMBUING ART)

description.value:
Type: Training (*)

Rank: 8 (Spell Level 4)

Chakra Cost:

Learn DC: 22 | Successes: 4

Perform: | Perform DC:

Components: None

This training technique comes in six varieties, each with a different subtype, and each relating to one of your ability scores: Strength (Taijutsu), Dexterity (Taijutsu), Constitution (Chakra Control), Intelligence (Ninjutsu), Wisdom (Chakra Control) and Charisma (Genjutsu). This technique can be learned six times: Once for each ability score. You cannot learn it twice for the same ability score.

You must have previously ingested an abilityenhancing drug of the appropriate kind (such as a Strength-enhancing Shinobi drug for the Strength variation) in order to be able to complete this training, which will increase the inherent bonus granted by the drug by +1.
